name: I hurt my shoulder at work but didn't tell anyone right away, can I still get comp in West Jordan?

mainEntity.name: I hurt my shoulder at work but didn't tell anyone right away, can I still get comp in West Jordan?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report ASAP—delays over limits bar claims, but explain good cause[1][6].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Possibly, but delays raise red flags and risk denial if over 180 days in Utah or 60 in Idaho.** Prompt reporting is required; insurers challenge late claims[1][5][6]. **Key factors:** Good cause for delay helps; medical proof essential; minor injuries still need report. **Practical guidance:** Report now explaining delay, get doctor eval linking to work, document everything. Lawyer can argue exceptions. **Quick action now maximizes chances.**

description: Report ASAP—delays over limits bar claims, but explain good cause[1][6].
